# Dashboard

Backs the web UI's dashboard. It subscribes to no events and has no settings; it exists to
expose GraphQL queries the frontend reads: library statistics, recent activity, releases by
year, debrid account status, and active playback sessions.

Hidden from the settings UI, and there is no reason to disable it unless you are not using
the web UI at all.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED -->
<!-- Generated by `cargo run --bin gen-docs` from each plugin's `settings_schema()`. Do not edit this block by hand. -->

**Category:** Other

This plugin subscribes to no events; it is driven directly by the core.

### Settings

This plugin has no configurable settings.
